structuredIssues.title: Truthful capability gap
structuredIssues.description: 12 capability gap(s) are tracked as fit/readiness risk, not unsupported visible claims.

evidence.reason: Capability gaps come from upstream Analysis / Positioning Report and are not recomputed by Reviewer.

structuredIssues.suggestedRepairIntent: Do not rewrite as a solved strength. Add new evidence or change target positioning upstream if needed.
